title: Luffy Enters the Mirror World
description: On pages 9–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Sanji, Unknown person #8, Katakuri as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.
scene: Luffy separates himself from the crew to face Katakuri in the mirror world while Sanji moves toward the cake plan.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Arms? legs? Tell me which parts of your body you don't need anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wiwiwivi! I heard every- thing, straw hat! I know about your rendezvous point!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can we play that wave game again, Mama?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This candy monster created a tsunami and sent them to the depths!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How in the world could they have ES- capped...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't know how! I just know they did!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And tonight, they'll show up on cacao Island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's what they promised straw hat luffy! I'm sure of it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is, without knowing that that's also our final destination!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MAMA! Your precious cake is on cacao Island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pudding's making the cake on cacao... one way or another, that's where all this will come to a head!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait a second! Where are you going?! Mama!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't afford to get sidetracked! That's nuts Island!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The cake was taken to cacao Island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He always attacks again in the direction I dodge to!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: People don't dodge my attacks this much.

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 43 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
